question: On Rural Motorways and Type 1 Dual Carriageway National Roads, what is the Desirable Minimum weaving length between grade-separated junctions?

ground_truth.value: Desirable Minimum weaving length between grade-separated junctions = 2 km.
ground_truth.quote: length between grade separated junctions shall be 2km.

candidates.label: C
candidates.answer: Desirable minimum weaving length 2 km (absolute min ~1 km) (uncertain).

candidates.label: D
candidates.answer: Desirable Minimum weaving length between grade separated junctions = 2km.
